title: onagra biennis
intro: Onagra biennis, also known as Wild Bergamot or Bee Balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Onagra biennis has been associated with various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting digestion. The herbal preparations of Onagra biennis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
